quality.rationale: 基于普适度规理论的引力波极化模式分析，通过测地偏离方程将时空曲率张量分量与粒子加速度直接关联，物理动机明确且结论结构可广泛迁移至不同引力理论

origin.question: Problem 18.21. Draw the force field of each of the modes in the preceding problem.
origin.answer: 六类引力波极化模式在测试粒子球面上诱导的位移矢量场分布（随时间以 $\cos(\\omega t)$ 振荡），其动力学由测地偏离方程 $\ddot{x}^{k} \\approx x^{j} R_{0j0}^{k}$ 决定。
origin.solution:
Solution 18.21. In the figure are the six polarization modes of a weak, plane, null gravitational wave permitted in the generic metric theory of gravity. The figure shows the displacement that each mode induces on a sphere of test particles. The wave propagates in the $+z$ -direction (arrow at upper right) and has time dependence $\cos(\omega t)$ . Solid line, snapshot at $\omega t = 0$ , the broken line, one at $\omega t = \pi$ . There is no displacement perpendicular to the plane of the figure. The above modes are obtained by using the equation of geodesic deviation
![](images/ec3963e04392702dc8f62ea7739aafdf85e5e54cca83dba6f92caeeafe0e91ee.jpg)
![](images/80bdd4f08f84473f33d62c2a65c4dd6bfb6c45947a76ed4048e193d8190c0a1a.jpg)
![](images/c9d33d2950b9ef58e2f30341a722ef7dd57821f61e5a9ed390a16fe00028d2.jpg)
![](images/d66b025949da6b6f48acca28980cd787c4d28613bac317ebbc0619c47d3c6f8.jpg)
![](images/7a1431e5aff95090256fdc8991f692adb22c9062c324cbc4c86e0266c2838d92.jpg)
$$
\frac {\mathrm {d}^{2} \mathrm {x}^{\mathrm {k}}}{\mathrm {d t}^{2}} \approx \mathrm {x}^{\mathrm {j}} \mathrm {R}_{0 \mathrm {j 0}}^{\mathrm {k}}.
$$
